root_cause: OCS context assembly existed without a bounded cognition runtime capable of producing deterministic replay-visible cognition findings.
runtime_model: The runtime validates context artifact hash, context hash, replay visibility, assembled status, and false authority flags.
The runtime analyzes normalized replay-visible source summaries.
The runtime identifies task intent, ambiguity, clarification requirements, domain candidates, worker candidates, and provider necessity.
The runtime computes cognition_hash from source context identity, analysis outputs, authority flags, status, and failure state.
Replay reconstruction validates ordering, wrapper hashes, artifact hashes, returned continuity, and cognition hash continuity.
replay_impact: OCS cognition now produces append-only replay-visible evidence.
Replay reconstruction can prove which OCS context hash cognition consumed.
The same OCS context artifact produces the same cognition hash.
The runtime does not mutate source replay.
The runtime does not invoke providers, workers, dispatch, approval, governance mutation, or execution.
boundaries_preserved: No replay mutation outside append-only OCS cognition evidence.
